subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Performance Requirement H1P1 for Class 1 and 10 buildings constructed in areas subject to seismic activity is satisfied if the building is constructed in accordance with Section 2 of the ABCB Housing Provisions.

ul.li: Most domestic structures are not required to be specifically designed for earthquakes.

There are certain limitations on the application to domestic structures such as Class 1a and 1b buildings in Appendix A of AS 1170.4. These limitations include building height, roof slope, etc. For additional information refer to Appendix A of AS 1170.4.
